title: OSF Source descriptor — next/ (AC-1 coverage: sources alongside profiles) — v2.0
description: Permissive AJV meta-schema for files under next/sources/** (postgresql/, rest/, static/). AC-1 requires the next/ validation pipeline to cover sources AND sync (not just profiles). This schema is deliberately CONSERVATIVE/PERMISSIVE: 'additionalProperties': true everywhere it is not certain, so it adds COVERAGE without imposing new constraints that would false-fail the existing, varied source files (DB pollers with columnMappings/edges, REST pollers with response/polling, and the static/anchor source with records[]/relationships[]/profileRefs[]). It pins only the small, universally-present spine: sourceId, version, sourceType, syncType, and the SHAPE of columnMappings/edges WHEN present. Deeper, per-sourceType semantics (connection shapes, valueMap, anchor records) are reviewed, not schema-pinned — same 'loose facet' pattern as isa95/constraints in the profile schemas. The id-property check (exactly one isId per source) is enforced separately where needed, not here.

_example.description: Optional meta flag: example/demo fixture, not canonical.

columnMappings.description: Column/field -> SM attribute projection. Each entry maps a source 'column' (or a literal 'const', or a template) onto an 'smAttribute'. Loosely typed: at least one of column/const must be present, smAttribute is required; optional isId/valueMap. additionalProperties allowed for forward-compat (e.g. template/transform).

edges.description: KG edges projected from this source (kg-builder / it-edge canonical KG projection). Loosely typed: 'type' is the relationship label; fkColumn/targetIdProp wire the join. additionalProperties allowed for forward-compat.
